title: Anika Bathroom Accessory Set/Modern Bathroom Essentials Set/Includes Toothbrush Holder, Waste Bin, Toilet Brush, Cup, Soap Dish and Soap Dispenser (Stone)
features: 6 PIECE BATHROOM SET – This six-piece bathroom accessory set brings together all the essentials for a well-organised and visually cohesive bathroom experience. Each item in the set features elegant wood accents, adding a touch of natural warmth to your space. Items in the set include a cup, toothbrush holder, waste bin, toilet brush, soap dish and soap dispenser.

SLEEK DESIGN – This 6-piece set showcases clean lines and a minimalist design that complements a wide range of bathroom styles. Each item in the set is durable for longevity, while the wood accents add a sophisticated, natural look.

DURABLE – The set combines resilient plastic and water-resistant wood, ensuring that each piece stands up to everyday use in humid environments. The plastic components are easy to clean and maintain, while the wood accents are naturally resistant to water, mildew, and shrinkage. These qualities make each accessory a durable choice for both functionality and longevity in the bathroom.

VERSATILE - Perfectly suited for family bathrooms, the six-piece set also adapts to professional settings such as hotels, resorts, and guest facilities. Designed to keep spaces tidy, organised, and stylish, this set is an ideal solution for both personal and commercial use.
ANIKA - Anika is the leading manufacturer of homeware, bathroom, and kitchen essentials. View the Anika store on Amazon to view the whole range today.
